description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a tall, rectangular structure with a predominantly green front panel and black sides and back. The front is fitted with a large glass display window, behind which several rows of colorful items or mock products are visible, suggesting a vending or prize-dispensing function. The control panel is located to the right of the glass, featuring a keypad, a display, and a coin slot, all arranged vertically. The cabinet is branded with the word 'BOXX' at both the top and bottom of the front panel in bold white letters. The side panels are plain black with no visible graphics or artwork. The overall design is modern and clean, with a sturdy, boxy form factor typical of urban arcade or vending machines.
description: A tall, green and black arcade game cabinet with a glass front, visible internal rows, and a vertically arranged control panel. The cabinet is branded 'BOXX' and has a modern, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing a plain black panel with a slight green edge from the front frame visible.
description_view_1: The front view displays the glass window with internal rows, the 'BOXX' branding, and the vertically aligned control panel with keypad and coin slot.
description_view_2: The right side of the cabinet, similar to the left, is plain black with a green edge from the front frame.
description_view_3: The back of the cabinet, entirely black and featureless, with no visible openings or graphics.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Vertical arrangement with a keypad, display, and coin slot; no joysticks or buttons visible for gameplay.
attribute_marquee_artwork: The marquee area features the 'BOXX' logo in white text on a green background, with no additional artwork or imagery.
